events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May, born in Hampton, Middlesex, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your all-time favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, born in Dartford, Kent, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: 83 years young and still rocking! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV's 45th Anniversary
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, famously beginning its broadcast with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: Video Killed...
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed music forever with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did you catch the first-ever broadcast?

events.title: Oasis 'Definitely Maybe' Anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, marking 32 years since it first hit shelves.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Impact
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. What's the standout track from their game-changing debut for you?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, an iconic three-day event of 'Peace & Music', began on this day in 1969 in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since the fields of Woodstock came alive with 'Peace & Music'. Which legendary performance do you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years since his passing. His music continues to define generations. What's your favourite Elvis hit?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who died on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Legendary Guitarist
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, 56 years on. His influence on rock music is immeasurable.

events.title: The Beatles 'Abbey Road' Anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released on September 26, 1969, in the UK, making it 57 years since its debut.

angles.name: Iconic Crossing
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history! What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the enduring frontwoman of The Pretenders, born in Akron, Ohio, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude are truly timeless.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher, born in Manchester, England, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the swagger after all these years.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' Anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971, marking 55 years since its profound message first resonated.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A timeless message of peace and unity that still resonates today.

events.title: First iPod 25th Anniversary
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the very first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music and marking its 25th anniversary.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: 25 years ago, the original iPod dropped and changed our music habits forever. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Which 007 film or theme song is your absolute favourite? Licence to thrill indeed.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' co-founder, singer, and songwriter, John Lennon, born in Liverpool in 1940.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire.
